level1.name: information_technology.n.01
level1.definition: the branch of engineering that deals with the use of computers and telecommunications to retrieve and store and transmit information

level1.name: angstrom.n.01
level1.definition: a metric unit of length equal to one ten billionth of a meter (or 0.0001 micron); used to specify wavelengths of electromagnetic radiation

level1.name: technology.n.01
level1.definition: the practical application of science to commerce or industry

level1.name: attachment.n.05
level1.definition: faithful support for a cause or political party or religion

level1.name: arsenic.n.02
level1.definition: a very poisonous metallic element that has three allotropic forms; arsenic and arsenic compounds are used as herbicides and insecticides and various alloys; found in arsenopyrite and orpiment and realgar

level1.name: intervention.n.01
level1.definition: the act of intervening (as to mediate a dispute, etc.)

level1.name: pen.n.01
level1.definition: a writing implement with a point from which ink flows

level1.name: data.n.01
level1.definition: a collection of facts from which conclusions may be drawn

level1.name: inch.n.01
level1.definition: a unit of length equal to one twelfth of a foot

level1.name: data.n.01
level1.definition: a collection of facts from which conclusions may be drawn

level1.name: insulin.n.01
level1.definition: hormone secreted by the isles of Langerhans in the pancreas; regulates storage of glycogen in the liver and accelerates oxidation of sugar in cells

level2.name: engineering.n.02
level2.definition: the discipline dealing with the art or science of applying scientific knowledge to practical problems

level2.name: metric_linear_unit.n.01
level2.definition: a linear unit of distance in metric terms

level2.name: profession.n.02
level2.definition: an occupation requiring special education (especially in the liberal arts or sciences)

level2.name: support.n.02
level2.definition: aiding the cause or policy or interests of

level2.name: chemical_element.n.01
level2.definition: any of the more than 100 known substances (of which 92 occur naturally) that cannot be separated into simpler substances and that singly or in combination constitute all matter

level2.name: engagement.n.07
level2.definition: the act of sharing in the activities of a group

level2.name: writing_implement.n.01
level2.definition: an implement that is used to write

level2.name: collection.n.01
level2.definition: several things grouped together or considered as a whole

level2.name: linear_unit.n.01
level2.definition: a unit of measurement of length

level2.name: collection.n.01
level2.definition: several things grouped together or considered as a whole

level2.name: hormone.n.01
level2.definition: the secretion of an endocrine gland that is transmitted by the blood to the tissue on which it has a specific effect

level3.name: metric_unit.n.01
level3.definition: a decimal unit of measurement of the metric system (based on meters and kilograms and seconds)

level3.name: occupation.n.01
level3.definition: the principal activity in your life that you do to earn money

level3.name: aid.n.02
level3.definition: the activity of contributing to the fulfillment of a need or furtherance of an effort or purpose

level3.name: substance.n.01
level3.definition: the real physical matter of which a person or thing consists

level3.name: group_action.n.01
level3.definition: action taken by a group of people

level3.name: implement.n.01
level3.definition: instrumentation (a piece of equipment or tool) used to effect an end

level3.name: unit_of_measurement.n.01
level3.definition: any division of quantity accepted as a standard of measurement or exchange

level3.name: secretion.n.02
level3.definition: a functionally specialized substance (especially one that is not a waste) released from a gland or cell

level4.name: knowledge_domain.n.01
level4.definition: the content of a particular field of knowledge

level4.name: unit_of_measurement.n.01
level4.definition: any division of quantity accepted as a standard of measurement or exchange

level4.name: part.n.01
level4.definition: something determined in relation to something that includes it

level4.name: instrumentality.n.03
level4.definition: an artifact (or system of artifacts) that is instrumental in accomplishing some end

level4.name: liquid_body_substance.n.01
level4.definition: the liquid parts of the body
